name: Birdies Indoor Golf
about: Birdies Indoor Golf is a premier indoor golf destination located in Blue Springs, MO, featuring 5 GSPro simulator bays. The facility offers high-fidelity golf simulation experiences with access to over 158 world-famous courses rendered in 3D graphics. Each bay is equipped with dual high-speed camera technology, providing precise data points to help golfers improve their skills. The venue accommodates groups of 1-6 players and is designed for both casual play and serious practice, with a focus on convenience and technological accuracy.
why_golfers_like_it: GSPro simulators with dual high-speed camera technology for precise data tracking
Access to 158+ world-famous courses with stunning 3D graphics
Flexible booking system with both daily rates and membership options
Clean, well-maintained facility with clear rules and guidelines

food_and_drink.notes: No food allowed in simulators; outside food not permitted
No alcohol allowed in simulators; BYOB not mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual high-speed camera technology for precise data points

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs. Club faces must be clean, though rentals are available onsite if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks to the simulators?
faq.answer: No, food and drink are not allowed inside the simulators. Outside food is also not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes roughly 1 hour for the average golfer to play 18 holes. Completion is not guaranteed due to varying player paces.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children under 12 must have an adult present at all times, and the facility accommodates families.
